image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you there's a secret to remembering more?
Context visual: It's called chunking—grouping information into smaller, meaningful units.
Escalation visual: Ever tried remembering a phone number as 123-456-7890 instead of 1234567890? That's chunking in action!
Evidence visual: Research shows that chunking can expand our working memory significantly, helping us retain more information.
Pattern Interrupt visual: Still skeptical? Think of how you learn languages—phrases are easier than single words.
Payoff visual: By chunking, you're not just memorizing; you're creating connections, making recall effortless.
Cta visual: Ready to supercharge your memory? Try chunking today!
